programme.title: Hometown Heroes
programme.sub-title: A Tribute to The Brett Boyer Foundation
programme.desc: Julie Couch transforms the Brett Boyer Foundation headquarters into a space that radiates joy and hope.

programme.title: The Sabrina Soto Show
programme.sub-title: Stars & Celebrations
programme.desc: Join Sabrina for a masterclass in stress-free hosting, ambiance, and the very best cosmic vibes.

programme.title: The Sabrina Soto Show
programme.sub-title: Creating Space: Boundaries in Everyday Life
programme.desc: Finding space for self-care can be hard but Terri Cole, Cat Cora and Dr. Ramani are here to help!

programme.title: The Sabrina Soto Show
programme.sub-title: Redesign Your Life
programme.desc: Sabrina gets inspired with expert insights from Lewis Howes, Catherine McCord, and Justina Blakeney.

programme.title: The Sabrina Soto Show
programme.sub-title: Chic Hacks: Style, Flights & Gluten-Free Delights
programme.desc: Boost your efficiency with life hacks from Chellie Carlson, Danielle Walker, and Trish Suhr.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.sub-title: Carnie Wilson: Rock Royalty's Infamous Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Matthew visits Carnie Wilson's Los Angeles home to whip up her Fall-to-Your-Knees Mac and Cheese.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.sub-title: Melba Wilson: A Harlem Icon
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Melba Wilson schools Matthew on the art of her legendary shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.sub-title: Burgers and Babka: Viral Sensations
programme.desc: Matthew meets trailblazers Matthew McIvor of Proudly Serving and the King of Babka, Shimi Aaron.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.sub-title: Fran & Theresa’s Family-Friendly Haven
programme.desc: Fran and Theresa want to create a safe, family-friendly haven for their 13 grandkids.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.sub-title: Eduardo & Gabriela’s Guest Retreat
programme.desc: Eduardo and Gabriela's ‘little’ home projects have piled up and they’re ready for Drew’s help.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.sub-title: Jack & Tyler’s Colorful Curb Appeal
programme.desc: Jack and Tyler have made their home picture-perfect, but now it’s time for the exterior to shine.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.sub-title: Kayla & Ryan’s Toddler To-Do List
programme.desc: Kayla and Ryan have a newborn and a toddler and need both functionality and style in their space.
